# AI Workflow Automation — Team Structure & Role Definitions
## Legal/Consulting Verticals | Phase 3: Operational Framework

**Version:** 1.0  
**Last Updated:** 2026-03-10  
**Applies to:** Launch Phase (Months 1–6)

---

## 1. Organizational Structure

```
                         ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
                         │           CEO/Founder           │
                         └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
                                        │
                    ┌───────────────────┼───────────────────┐
                    │                   │                   │
        ┌───────────▼────────┐ ┌────────▼────────┐ ┌───────▼────────┐
        │   VP Engineering   │ │  VP Customer    │ │   VP Product   │
        │                    │ │    Success      │ │   & Strategy   │
        └───────────┬────────┘ └────────┬────────┘ └───────┬────────┘
                    │                   │                   │
    ┌───────────────┼───────┐   ┌───────┼───────┐   ┌──────┴────────┐
    │               │       │   │       │       │   │               │
┌───▼──┐     ┌─────▼────┐ ┌▼───┴─┐ ┌───▼───┐ ┌─▼──┴┐         ┌─────▼─────┐
│Platform│    │  AI/ML   │ │Integr│ │Support│ │CSM  │         │ Vertical  │
│  Team  │    │  Team    │ │ations│ │ Team  │ │Team │         │  Experts  │
└────────┘    └──────────┘ └──────┘ └───────┘ └─────┘         └───────────┘
```

---

## 2. Leadership Roles

### CEO/Founder
**Reports to:** Board of Directors  
**Direct Reports:** VP Engineering, VP Customer Success, VP Product & Strategy

**Core Responsibilities:**
- Strategic direction and vision
- Investor relations and fundraising
- Culture and values champion
- Executive customer relationships
- Final escalation point

**Key Metrics:**
- ARR growth rate
- Customer retention (NRR)
- Employee satisfaction
- Time to close strategic deals

### VP Engineering
**Reports to:** CEO  
**Direct Reports:** Platform Team Lead, AI/ML Team Lead, Integrations Team Lead, QA Lead

**Core Responsibilities:**
- Product delivery and reliability
- Technical architecture decisions
- Engineering culture and process
- Security and compliance posture
- Budget and resource allocation

**Key Metrics:**
- System uptime (99.99% target)
- Deployment frequency
- Change failure rate
- Mean time to recovery (MTTR)
- Engineering velocity

**Launch Phase Priorities:**
- Stabilize production systems
- Achieve SOC 2 Type II certification
- Build AI/ML operational capabilities
- Establish 24/7 on-call coverage

### VP Customer Success
**Reports to:** CEO  
**Direct Reports:** Support Manager, CSM Manager, Implementation Manager

**Core Responsibilities:**
- Customer retention and expansion
- Support and implementation quality
- Customer health monitoring
- Professional services offerings
- Voice of customer into product

**Key Metrics:**
- Net Revenue Retention (NRR > 120%)
- Gross Revenue Retention (GRR > 90%)
- Net Promoter Score (NPS > 40)
- Time to value (TTV < 30 days)
- Support CSAT (> 4.5/5)

**Launch Phase Priorities:**
- Onboard first 10 customers successfully
- Establish repeatable onboarding playbook
- Build support organization to handle SLA commitments
- Identify and cultivate customer references

### VP Product & Strategy
**Reports to:** CEO  
**Direct Reports:** Vertical Experts, Competitive Intelligence, Pricing & Packaging

**Core Responsibilities:**
- Product roadmap and prioritization
- Market and competitive intelligence
- Vertical strategy (Legal, Consulting, etc.)
- Pricing and packaging
- Strategic partnerships

**Key Metrics:**
- Feature adoption rates
- Time to market for new features
- Win/loss rate
- Deal velocity
- Product-market fit score

**Launch Phase Priorities:**
- Legal/Consulting vertical deep-dive
- Feature prioritization for v1.x
- Partnership strategy with DMS providers
- Reference customer program

---

## 3. Operational Teams

### 3.1 Platform Engineering Team
**Lead:** Platform Team Lead  
**Team Size (Launch):** 4 engineers  
**Location:** Distributed / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| Senior Backend Engineer | 2 | Node.js/Python, microservices, Kafka |
| DevOps / SRE | 1 | Kubernetes, Terraform, observability |
| Security Engineer | 1 | Application security, compliance, pentesting |

**Responsibilities:**
- Core platform infrastructure
- API development and maintenance
- Database design and optimization
- Security implementation and audits
- Observability and monitoring
- On-call rotation (24/7)

**Success Metrics:**
- API response time P99 < 200ms
- Zero security incidents
- Deployment frequency > 1/day
- 80% alert coverage

###

arguments.newText:
### 3.1 Platform Engineering Team
**Lead:** Platform Team Lead
**Team Size (Launch):** 4 engineers
**Location:** Distributed / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| Senior Backend Engineer | 2 | Node.js/Python, microservices, Kafka |
| DevOps / SRE | 1 | Kubernetes, Terraform, observability |
| Security Engineer | 1 | Application security, compliance, pentesting |

**Responsibilities:**
- Core platform infrastructure
- API development and maintenance
- Database design and optimization
- Security implementation and audits
- Observability and monitoring
- On-call rotation (24/7)

**Success Metrics:**
- API response time P99 < 200ms
- Zero security incidents
- Deployment frequency > 1/day
- 80% alert coverage

### 3.2 AI/ML Engineering Team
**Lead:** AI/ML Team Lead
**Team Size (Launch):** 3 engineers
**Location:** Distributed / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| ML Engineer | 2 | Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, NLP, LLMs |
| Data Engineer | 1 | ETL pipelines, vector DBs, data modeling |

**Responsibilities:**
- Model training and fine-tuning
- Prompt engineering and optimization
- RAG pipeline implementation
- Document processing and OCR pipelines
- Vector store management
- Model evaluation and monitoring

**Success Metrics:**
- Document processing accuracy > 95%
- Model inference latency < 500ms
- Model drift detection coverage 100%

### 3.3 Integrations Team
**Lead:** Integrations Team Lead
**Team Size (Launch):** 2 engineers
**Location:** Distributed / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| Integration Engineer | 2 | REST/GraphQL APIs, OAuth, webhook systems |

**Responsibilities:**
- DMS connector development (iManage, NetDocuments, SharePoint)
- API gateway management
- OAuth and SSO implementation
- Webhook event handling
- Partner certification process

**Success Metrics:**
- New connector development time < 4 weeks
- Integration uptime > 99.9%
- Partner certification pass rate > 90%

### 3.4 Customer Success Team
**Lead:** VP Customer Success
**Team Size (Launch):** 5 members
**Location:** SF HQ / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| Support Specialist | 2 | Zendesk/Salesforce, troubleshooting, communication |
| Customer Success Manager | 2 | Account management, legal tech domain |
| Implementation Manager | 1 | Project management, onboarding, training |

**Responsibilities:**
- Tier 1/2 technical support
- Customer onboarding and training
- Account health monitoring
- Escalation management
- Reference customer development
- Success playbook documentation

**Success Metrics:**
- First response time < 2 hours
- Resolution time < 24 hours (P1 issues)
- Customer satisfaction (CSAT) > 4.5/5
- Onboarding completion rate > 90%

### 3.5 Product & Strategy Team
**Lead:** VP Product & Strategy
**Team Size (Launch):** 4 members
**Location:** SF HQ / Hybrid

**Roles:**
| Role | Count | Key Skills |
|------|-------|------------|
| Product Manager | 2 | B2B SaaS, legal tech, roadmap management |
| Vertical Expert (Legal) | 1 | Legal industry expertise, practice management |
| Competitive Intelligence | 1 | Market analysis, pricing, win/loss analysis |

**Responsibilities:**
- Product roadmap prioritization
- Vertical market requirements gathering
- Competitive analysis and positioning
- Pricing and packaging strategy
- Partnership evaluation
- Go-to-market planning

**Success Metrics:**
- Feature delivery on-time rate > 80%
- Win/loss analysis completed for 90% of deals
- Pricing review cycle per quarter

---

## 4. Hiring Timeline (Months 1–6)

### Month 1: Foundation
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| VP Engineering | Critical | Executive search |
| VP Customer Success | Critical | Executive search |
| VP Product & Strategy | Critical | Executive search |

### Month 2: Core Team
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| Platform Team Lead | High | Internal / External |
| AI/ML Team Lead | High | External (AI talent) |
| Senior Backend Engineer (×2) | High | External |
| Product Manager | High | External |

### Month 3: Customer-Facing
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| CSM Manager | High | External (legal tech exp) |
| Support Manager | High | External |
| Implementation Manager | High | External |
| DevOps/SRE | High | External |

### Month 4: Scale Engineering
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| ML Engineer (×2) | Medium | External (PhD preferred) |
| Security Engineer | High | External |
| Integrations Team Lead | Medium | External |

### Month 5: Vertical & Intelligence
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| Vertical Expert (Legal) | Medium | Industry hire (BigLaw/AmLaw 200) |
| Competitive Intelligence | Medium | External |
| Customer Success Manager (×2) | Medium | External |

### Month 6: Integration & Support
| Role | Priority | Source |
|------|----------|--------|
| Integration Engineer (×2) | Medium | External |
| Support Specialist (×2) | Medium | External |
| Data Engineer | Medium | External |

**Total Headcount by End of Month 6:** 22–25 employees

---

## 5. Salary Ranges — San Francisco Market (2026)

| Role | Base Salary (SF) | Equity | Total Comp |
|------|------------------|--------|------------|
| CEO/Founder | $200K–$250K | 15%–25% | $400K–$600K |
| VP Engineering | $220K–$280K | 1.0%–2.0% | $350K–$500K |
| VP Customer Success | $180K–$230K | 0.5%–1.0% | $280K–$400K |
| VP Product & Strategy | $200K–$260K | 0.8%–1.5% | $320K–$480K |

### Engineering
| Role | Base Salary (SF) | Equity | Total Comp |
|------|------------------|--------|------------|
| Platform Team Lead | $180K–$220K | 0.3%–0.5% | $260K–$350K |
| AI/ML Team Lead | $190K–$240K | 0.4%–0.6% | $280K–$380K |
| Integrations Team Lead | $160K–$200K | 0.2%–0.4% | $220K–$300K |
| Senior Backend Engineer | $160K–$200K | 0.15%–0.3% | $220K–$300K |
| ML Engineer | $170K–$210K | 0.2%–0.4% | $240K–$330K |
| DevOps/SRE | $150K–$190K | 0.1%–0.25% | $200K–$280K |
| Security Engineer | $160K–$200K | 0.15%–0.3% | $220K–$300K |
| Data Engineer | $150K–$185K | 0.1%–0.2% | $200K–$270K |
| Integration Engineer | $140K–$175K | 0.1%–0.2% | $180K–$250K |

### Customer Success
| Role | Base Salary (SF) | Equity | Total Comp |
|------|------------------|--------|------------|
| CSM Manager | $130K–$160K | 0.08%–0.15% | $160K–$220K |

| Implementation Manager | $125K–$155K | 0.06%–0.12% | $150K–$200K |

### Product & Strategy

|------|------------------|--------|------------|
| Product Manager | $140K–$180K | 0.1%–0.2% | $180K–$250K |

## 6. Hiring Notes & Assumptions

### SF Market Considerations
- **Competitive landscape:** Legal tech AI talent in high demand
- **Remote flexibility Engineering:** roles can be 50–100% remote
- **Customer-facing roles:** Prefer SF Bay Area for proximity to legal customers
- **Equity splits:** Standard for Series A stage; refresh grants at Series B

### Non-Standard Benefits (Competitive Differentiators)
- Home office setup: $2,500 stipend
- Learning budget: $3,000/year
- Mental health: 100% coverage
- Legal tech conference attendance: unlimited with manager approval
- AI/ML Compute credits: $500/month for relevant roles

---
